title: gladiolus × ramosus
intro: Gladiolus × ramosus, also known as the hybrid gladiolus, is a plant species that belongs to the iris family and is a cross between Gladiolus communis and Gladiolus italicus. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus × ramosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and burns. The herbal preparations of Gladiolus × ramosus include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
